title: Chapter 4 Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of Chapter 4 concepts!

questions.question: Which loop is optimal when you exactly know how many times an action must repeat?
questions.explanation: The for loop is explicitly structured for a set numeric range of repetitions.

questions.question: Which command instantly aborts the entire loop entirely?
questions.explanation: The break keyword immediately terminates the enclosing loop.

questions.question: What does `continue` do within a loop context?
options: Skips to the next iteration step
questions.explanation: Continue abandons the current cycle and skips right ahead to the start of the next one.
